premise: My husband’s will left me a $320,000 lake cabin and half his antique gun collection, but my adult stepson forged a codicil claiming I’d abandoned the property, staged a break-in, and got me arrested for theft. I proved the codicil was forged through a forensic linguist, had charges dismissed, won a $400,000 malicious prosecution judgment, and turned the cabin into a women’s retreat with a plaque reading ‘Justice Preserves.’
